integration_report.summary: MT-1/MT-2/MT-3 통합 완료. pipeline.py diff gate/verify evidence/attest blocking/PIPELINE_CLUSTER_DIR, tests/test_patch_lane.py 23개 테스트 격리, .github/workflows/ci.yml UTF-8+pipeline.py patch plan 연동 — 전체 pytest 통과.

modules_integrated.module: pipeline.py: _get_cluster_dir, _get_actual_diff_scope, diff gate, verify evidence 필수화, attest blocking, outputs_manifest check 구현 완료
tests/test_patch_lane.py: PIPELINE_CLUSTER_DIR 격리 autouse fixture + 8개 신규 테스트, pytest 23/23 PASS
.github/workflows/ci.yml: UTF-8 인코딩 설정 + pipeline.py patch plan --base-ref origin/main 연동 완료

integration_tests.test: PATCH_SKIP_DIFF=1 autouse fixture: diff gate 건너뜀 확인
diff gate (PATCH_SKIP_DIFF=0): 실제 변경 파일/라인 계산
ci.yml UTF-8 인코딩 설정 존재 확인
ci.yml pipeline.py patch plan --base-ref origin/main 호출 확인
